testcase.name: A visible error says 'Unable to create account. Please try again later.' and the user remains on the signup form.

failure.message: A visible error says 'Unable to create account. Please try again later.' and the user remains on the signup form.

testcase.failure: Expected: A valid signup submission should end in an unambiguous success state or a specific recoverable validation message. Observed: A visible error says 'Unable to create account. Please try again later.' and the user remains on the signup form. Evidence: screenshots/004_web_state.png
